title: malaxis aphylla
intro: Malaxis aphylla, also known as the leafless Malaxis or green adder's tongue, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malaxis aphylla include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its herbal preparations may also involve drying or decocting the plant material for medicinal use.
